Wednesday, 15 October 2025

Volume 787

Sitting date: 15 October 2025

Oral Questions

Question No. 1—Prime Minister

Rt Hon CHRIS HIPKINS (Leader of the Opposition): Does he stand by his Government?

Rt Hon CHRISTOPHER LUXON (Prime Minister): Yes.

SPEAKER: That concludes oral questions.

Debate resumed. This narrative is not a speaker turn.
